description_long: This is a rectangular, straight-sided bottle with a long neck and a prominent shoulder, resembling the iconic Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey bottle. The front face features a large, ornate black-and-white label with the Jack Daniel's logo, product name, and decorative flourishes. The back and side faces display additional text and branding, including gold medal awards and manufacturing details, all in a similar ornate style. The bottle appears to be made of glass with a metallic or plastic screw cap, and the surface shows a slightly worn, matte finish with some visible discoloration and scuff marks. The bottle is opaque, preventing any view of the interior or contents. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy, collectible liquor bottle often found in urban environments such as bars, sidewalks, or recycling bins.
description: A rectangular, opaque Jack Daniel's whiskey bottle with ornate black-and-white labeling and a long neck, showing signs of wear and a screw cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey label in black and white with ornate borders.
description_view_1: Back view displaying gold medal awards and manufacturing information in white and gold text on a black label.
description_view_2: Rear view with no labeling, showing the plain, slightly worn glass surface and the bottle's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Side view with additional branding and text, including 'Made in Tennessee' and a graphic, all in white on a black background.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label: 'Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey' in ornate white text on black background; back and side labels: gold and white text with award and manufacturing details; all labels are rectangular and cover most of the bottle's faces.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Visible discoloration and scuff marks, but no major dents, cracks, or structural damage.
